Title: Relates to special franchise assessments and requires any reduction of the tax burden of certain utilities to pass-through to ratepayers
Summary: Exempts certain utilities from special franchise assessments in New York city; requires that any reduction in special franchise taxes imposed on ConEd and National Grid shall be passed-through to rates charged to its ratepayers so that the full economic benefit of such reduction accrues to their ratepayers.
LawCode: Amd §102, RPT L; add §72-b, Pub Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to the definition of special franchise property; and to amend the public service law, in relation to requiring any reduction of Consolidated Edison, Inc.'s or National Grid's tax burden to pass-through to its ratepayers
